curiosityTopic: OpenClaw channel plugin architecture for L2 implementation
learned: Channel plugins use ChannelPlugin interface with adapters for config, outbound, gateway, security. Telegram plugin is a good reference. Created clawish-l2-plugin-design.md with implementation plan.
notes: Explored OpenClaw plugin SDK types, Telegram channel implementation. Documented L2 plugin design. Ready to implement when Allan wakes up.
